summary: Proof Availability Enhancement Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (7/7). All frontend UI tests passed. The proof availability block correctly shows: (1) Red 'Pas de récupération automatique' with ✕ icon for Meet Gmail personal, (2) Green 'Récupération automatique' with ✓ icon for Teams, (3) No proof block for physical appointments, (4) No proof block on InvitationPage (participant view).

frontend: Meet (Gmail personal): proof-status-no-auto has red background (bg-red-50)
Meet (Gmail personal): checkin-msg-meet-personal has red background
Meet (Gmail personal): checkin-msg-meet-personal shows 'Aucune preuve automatique disponible'
Meet (Gmail personal): Check-in button is PRIMARY (not hidden in details)
Meet (Gmail personal): Check-in button text is 'Confirmer ma présence (check-in)'
Teams: checkin-msg-auto-fetch shows 'Récupération automatique via Teams'
Teams: Check-in button is hidden inside <details> (fallback)

critical_code_review_comments: AppointmentDetail.js lines 1040-1076: Proof availability block correctly implemented with provider-specific logic (red for Meet personal, amber for Meet Workspace, green for Teams/Zoom)
AppointmentDetail.js lines 1371-1454: Check-in section correctly shows provider-specific messaging and promotes manual check-in as PRIMARY for Meet personal
Gmail personal detection logic: email.endsWith('@gmail.com') || email.endsWith('@googlemail.com') - correctly implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proof Availability Enhancement fully tested. Key verified features: (1) Meet Gmail personal shows red 'Pas de récupération automatique' block with ✕ icon and promotes manual check-in as PRIMARY action, (2) Teams shows green 'Récupération automatique' block with ✓ icon and hides check-in in details as fallback, (3) Physical appointments do NOT show organizer-identity-block or proof-availability-block, (4) InvitationPage (participant view) does NOT show any proof-related blocks. Data-testids verified: proof-availability-block, proof-status-no-auto, proof-status-auto, proof-status-manual-import (amber for Meet Workspace - not tested as no test data), checkin-msg-meet-personal, checkin-msg-auto-fetch.

code_verification.AppointmentDetail.js_proof_availability_: Lines 1040-1076 - Provider-specific proof status with correct colors and icons
code_verification.AppointmentDetail.js_checkin_section: Lines 1371-1454 - Provider-specific messaging with Meet personal PRIMARY check-in
code_verification.InvitationPage.js_no_proof_blocks: Verified via Playwright - no proof-related data-testids found
